prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约650名、726名、837名、748名、696名。2021至2023年位次持续后移（从650降至837），2024年反弹至748，2025年进一步回升至696。近5年位次波动区间为650–837，2025年基准位次约696名，处于近年中位偏前水平；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划2021年98人、2022年98人、2023年96人、2024年96人、2025年95人、2026年95人。2026年计划与2025年持平，未出现扩招或缩招，对竞争格局无直接冲击。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京航空航天大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第15名、2022年第15名、2023年第14名、2024年第12名、2025年第11名、2026年第11名，排名持续上升，稳居全国顶尖高校行列；2026年高考周期声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要涉及杨昀师德失范与学术不端事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制。抖音热度排名第56（较热），关注度中等偏上。历史投档异常记录中未发现北航在辽宁有明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，A+学科7个（仪器科学与技术、材料科学与工程、生物医学工程、管理科学与工程、航空宇航科学与技术、计算机科学与技术、软件工程），A-及以上共16个。计算机、软件、航空宇航等王牌专业与物理类招生高度对应，学科实力对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等北航核心招生大类在2026年专业热度分析中均被评为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，社会报考热度持续高涨。辽宁省2026年高考总人数约20万，与2025年（约19.97万）基本持平，竞争环境稳定。；北航位于北京，属跨省招生。辽宁省与北京地理位置较近，地域偏好无明显偏向。该校在辽宁物理类招生人数约95人，占其全国招生计划一定比例，属正常跨省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次696名、招生计划持平、学校层次持续上升的强吸引力、王牌专业社会热度高涨等正向因素，以及2026年声誉负面事件的有限抑制，预计2026年物理类最低位次在696基础上小幅后移至约716名，波动区间634–798名。最关键影响因素：①北航软科排名升至第11名，顶尖985地位对高分考生吸引力不减；②招生计划持平，供需关系稳定；③声誉负面事件影响有限，不足以逆转报考热度。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 650, 726, 837, 748, and 696 respectively. Rankings continuously declined from 2021 to 2023 (from 650 to 837), rebounded to 748 in 2024, and further recovered to 696 in 2025. Over the past 5 years, the ranking fluctuation range is 650–837, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 696, which is slightly above the median of recent years. The enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province for Physics Category was 98 in 2021, 98 in 2022, 96 in 2023, 96 in 2024, 95 in 2025, and 95 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction, thus no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beihang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 15th in 2021, 15th in 2022, 14th in 2023, 12th in 2024, 11th in 2025, and 11th in 2026, with a continuously rising ranking, firmly among the top universities in China. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is "significantly negative," mainly involving Yang Yun's moral misconduct and academic fraud incidents, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 56th (relatively hot), with above-average attention. Historical abnormal admission records show no obvious gap signal for Beihang in Liaoning. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 7 A+ disciplines (Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Aerospace Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering), and a total of 16 disciplines rated A- or above. Top majors such as Computer Science, Software Engineering, and Aerospace Science and Technology are highly aligned with Physics Category admissions, and the university's academic strength strongly attracts high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment categories of Beihang, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, are rated as "highly recommended" or "recommended" in the 2026 major popularity analysis, with sustained high social application enthusiasm. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Province college entrance examination is approximately 200,000, basically the same as 2025 (about 199,700), indicating a stable competitive environment. Beihang is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial enrollment. Liaoning Province is geographically close to Beijing, with no obvious regional preference bias. The university enrolls about 95 students in Liaoning for Physics Category, accounting for a certain proportion of its national enrollment plan, which is a normal inter-provincial enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering positive factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 696, stable enrollment plan, strong attractiveness of the continuously rising university level, and high social popularity of top majors, as well as the limited suppression effect of the 2026 reputation negative incident, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly decline from 696 to approximately 716, with a fluctuation range of 634–798. The most critical influencing factors: ① Beihang's Soft Science ranking rose to 11th, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring candidates as a top 985 university; ② The enrollment plan remains unchanged, with stable supply and demand; ③ The impact of the reputation negative incident is limited and insufficient to reverse application enthusiasm.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 716, with a range of 634–798. Tier 1 majors (Future Aerospace Leading, Computing and Intelligent Science, Mathematics Top-Notch) have historical rankings in the 300–400 range, far exceeding the predicted ranking, so they are recommended as reach choices. Tier 2 majors (Information Science and Technology, Aerospace, Aircraft Power Engineering, Engineering Mechanics) have rankings around 500–700, close to the predicted ranking, and can be used as core stable choices. Tier 3 majors (Medical-Engineering Cross, Sino-French Engineer, Quantum Technology) have rankings around 600–700, suitable as safety choices. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, boldly apply for Tier 1 as reach, and safely use Tier 3 as backup.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 411, 415, 373, 366, and 371 respectively. Over the past 5 years, rankings have been stable within the 366–415 range, with consecutive three years (2023–2025) maintaining around 370, showing minimal fluctuation. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 371. The enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province was 5 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 7 in 2024, 3 in 2025, and 3 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with a very small enrollment size (only 3 students), making ranking fluctuations significantly impactful on individual applicants.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beihang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranks 11th in the 2026 Soft Science Rankings, making it a top national university with strong brand appeal to liberal arts applicants. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative' (Yang Yun incident), but this incident mainly involves science and engineering supervisors, having relatively limited impact on the application psychology of History Category students. Its Douyin popularity ranks 56th (relatively hot), with moderate attention. Beihang's Foreign Language and Literature is an A-level discipline, corresponding to majors like English, Translation, German, and French within the Social Science Pilot Class (History Category enrollment major), indicating strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Social Science Pilot Class covers directions such as Law, Public Administration, and Economics. Law has a social popularity rating of 'recommended' (slightly hot), while Economics is 'divided and wait-and-see'. The total number of examinees in Liaoning Province for 2026 is about 200,000, roughly the same as 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 371, unchanged enrollment plan of 3 students, strong university level appeal, and limited impact of reputation negative events, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from 371 to about 381, with a fluctuation range of 331–431. Key influencing factors: ① Enrollment plan of only 3 students makes rankings sensitive to individual applicant fluctuations but overall trend stable; ② Beihang's top 985 brand still has strong appeal to liberal arts applicants; ③ Rankings over the past 3 years have stabilized around 370 with no significant trend changes.
